Table	Create Table
test_profiles	CREATE TABLE `test_profiles` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `protocol` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'CUSTOM',
  `test_type` enum('VABF','VSR','VABE') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `domain` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `profile_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `target_host` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `target_port` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `parameters` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `config` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `test_profiles_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_profiles_project` (`project_id`),
  KEY `idx_profiles_test_type` (`test_type`),
  KEY `idx_profiles_created` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=90001
